title: Birth of Lemonchan
overview: Dr. Hanamizukawa's daughter is kidnapped and he works on a project to bring her home.

title: Lemonchan VS Shiroary
overview: Shiroary invades a young woman's room, and Lemonchan rushes to try and help.

title: Going to the Secret base of Shiroary
overview: Lemonchan gives chase to Shiroary, heading to the creature's lair.
